scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-rally "vitest run --project rules"
scripts.test:integration: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,auth --project demo-rally "vitest run --project integration"
scripts.test:e2e: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,auth --project demo-rally "BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 playwright test --project full"
scripts.gate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:rules && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e:smoke
scripts.sync:core: npm --prefix ../cohort-common run build && rm -rf vendor/cohort-core/dist vendor/cohort-core/src && cp -R ../cohort-common/dist vendor/cohort-core/dist && cp -R ../cohort-common/src vendor/cohort-core/src && cp ../cohort-common/package.json vendor/cohort-core/package.json
